headline: Frontier, Carnival, and Norwegian Cruise Line Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after easing pressure in the bond market and a pullback in oil prices boosted investor sentiment for consumer-facing companies.

raw.headline: Frontier, Carnival, and Norwegian Cruise Line Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Norwegian Cruise Line, Lowers Price Target to $19
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $20 to $19.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Norwegian Cruise Line, Lowers Price Target to $20
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Patrick Scholes   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $25 to $20.
